    Contact

    The fastest way to reach me is by email.

     Send me an email

    📧 anhtuan.mai19@gmail.com

    I usually reply within a couple of days. If you don’t hear back, feel free to ping me again.

    Other ways to reach out

    • 🔗 LinkedIn — professional inquiries, networking
    • 💻 GitHub — open issues or discussions on my repos
    • 💬 Stack Overflow — technical Q&A

    What works best

    Topic Best channel
    Job opportunities, collaboration Email or LinkedIn
    Bug reports, code questions GitHub issue on the relevant repo
    Quick technical questions Stack Overflow comment / Email
